headline: Republic Services Again Recognized Among the World's Most Ethical Companies
summary: Republic Services, Inc. (NYSE: RSG), a leader in the environmental services industry, has been named to Ethisphere's list of the World's Most Ethical Companies® for the eighth time. The company is among 138 honorees representing 17 countries and 40 industries recognized by Ethisphere, a global leader in defining and promoting ethical business standards.

headline: Wells Fargo Maintains Overweight on Republic Services, Raises Price Target to $252
summary: Wells Fargo  analyst Jerry Revich   maintains Republic Services (NYSE:RSG) with a Overweight and raises the price target from $238 to $252.
